title: SkyGrid Reloaded
description: Customizable SkyGrid world preset for modern Minecraft
body: # About the mod **SkyGrid Reloaded** is a mod that adds SkyGrid as a world preset. It is inspired by SethBling's [original survival map](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5dhs3ithXDA) and has the following features: * Customizable block weightings, chest loot, mob spawners and biomes with a client side UI. * Several in-built presets. * Locally savable custom presets. * Core of mod is **server-side** - clients do not need the mod to connect to servers running SkyGrid worlds. * Support for modded blocks, items, entities and dimensions.
